features: BRIGHT SMILES: Give yourself reason to smile brightly when you rinse with Colgate Max White Purple Reveal Mouthwash.

WHITE TEETH FOR LONGER: Our teeth whitening mouthwash has been specially designed to keep your teeth white for longer* by offering lasting stain prevention*. *Protection from surface stains, with continued use.
PREVENTS DISCOLOURATION**: Our mouthwash helps to prevent yellow discolouration** to keep your teeth looking great. **Caused by surface stains.
CAVITY PROTECTION: This teeth whitening mouthwash offers you effective cavity protection with fluoride*** to help keep your teeth healthy. ***Plaque bacteria protection with twice daily use.
ALCOHOL FREE MOUTHWASH: Our mouthwash has been clinically tested by dentists and contains 0% alcohol. This formula does not contain ethanol.
Colgate Max White Purple Reveal Mouthwash helps keep your teeth white for longer* and offers lasting stain prevention*. *Protection from surface stains, with continued use.
description: Product Description Give yourself even more reason to smile brightly when you rinse with Colgate Max White Purple Reveal Mouthwash. This purple teeth whitening mouthwash has been specially designed to keep your teeth white for longer* by offering lasting stain prevention* and helping to prevent yellow discolouration**. The purple mouthwash also offers you effective cavity protection with fluoride*** to help keep your teeth healthy. And it’s also been clinically tested by dentists and contains 0% alcohol †! Show off your white smile with confidence when you rinse with this mouthwash. *Protection from surface stains, with continued use. **Caused by surface stains. ***Plaque bacteria protection with twice daily use. † This formula does not contain ethanol. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitol, Tetrapotassium Pyrophosphate, Polysorbate 20, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Zinc Citrate, PVM/MA Copolymer, Aroma, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, CI 17200, CI 42051. Contains: Sodium Fluoride Total Fluoride content: 225 ppm Directions 1. Shake the bottle before use. 2. Rinse your mouth with 10 to 15 ml of mouthwash. 3. Do it for 30 seconds. 4. Spit it out. Safety Warning Do not swallow, Avoid contact with eyes See more
